name: Dilled Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 small Red onion, sliced and separated into rings
recipeInstructions:
Prepare cauliflower as directed on page 634; separate into florets. Prepare green beans as directed on page 617; leave beans whole. Heat 1 inch salted water (1/2 tsp salt to 1 cup water) to boiling. Add florets and beans. Cover and heat to boiling; reduce heat. Boil until crisp-tender, 6 to 8 minutes; drain.
Place florets, beans and onion rings in a shallow glass dish. Combine remaining ingredients in a tightly covered container; pour over vegetables. Cover and refrigerate, stirring once, at least 4 hours. Drain before serving. 8 servings; 40 calories per serving.
